_comment: exp_019 — GRPO pass 3. Same recipe as exp_015 pass 2, two changes only: (1) start from the merged pass-2 model TrevorDuong/qwen3-4b-thinking-grpo-pass2, (2) use the fresh curriculum_pass3.json built from difficulty_samples_pass2.jsonl with the same exp_015 filter (num_correct==1, allow_clipped, FF:MCQ>=2). Reward shape + length_bonus + max_completion_length=4096 unchanged from exp_015 — that recipe produced +0.89pp at stage-1 (exp_017) and +0.017 Kaggle (exp_018), do not change.
_curriculum_note: Built from data/difficulty_samples_pass2.jsonl (DSMLP resample of the merged pass-2 model on full public.jsonl). Strict filter (1-3 correct, no clip) yielded 92 prompts but 43% of pass-2 samples were clipped at 6144 tokens; loose filter (correct==1, allow_clipped) yielded 122 (74 MCQ / 48 FF), capped to 24 MCQ to maintain FF:MCQ>=2 ratio. Final size: 72 prompts (24 MCQ / 48 FF).

length_bonus.note: Same as exp_015. Continuous descent from 0.05 at len=0 to 0.0 at cap; guarantees nonzero reward_std even when discrete reward terms collapse across the 4 generations in a group.

_ref_model_note: ref_model intentionally unset — TRL defaults ref=base_model=pass-2 GRPO. Do NOT override to strict70 or base Thinking-2507 (would pull policy backward).

vllm._note: Kaggle inference config after training. Use cse151b-notebook with model_id=output_repo (after running merge_and_push.ipynb to merge the adapter).
